regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Auckland typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
